transcription.text: We're bringing the noise, go baby, we bringing our toys Separate men from the boys, chop up your fingers, should be on the voice Bang, bang, we gon' ride out, gang, gang, we gon' die out Want it like this, ain't no time outs, tell me who really gon' ride out We're outtie
